executive_summary_zh: 今天候选内容整体信号偏弱，只有一条与工程管理相关且具一定可操作性的 GitHub 官方更新值得保留。
该更新的核心价值不在 AI 编码能力本身，而在于为平台团队提供 GitHub Code Quality 商业化前的席位/活跃提交者成本预估，可用于预算、试点范围控制与治理决策。
executive_summary_en: Today's candidate set is weak overall, with only one GitHub update offering moderate value for engineering/platform leaders.
The main value is not new AI coding capability, but pre-GA cost visibility for GitHub Code Quality, which helps platform teams plan budget, scope pilots, and make governance decisions.

items.title: GitHub Code Quality license estimate in public preview - GitHub Changelog
items.summary_zh: GitHub 在 Code Quality 正式收费前推出许可证费用预估功能，企业可在 Billing and licensing 页面查看基于 active committers 的预计月度成本。该预估仅覆盖每位活跃提交者的许可费用，不包含 CodeQL 所消耗的 GitHub Actions 分钟，也不包含 Copilot Autofix 等 AI 能力的用量费用。
items.summary_en: GitHub added a license cost estimate for Code Quality ahead of paid GA, letting enterprises view projected monthly spend based on active committers. The estimate only covers per-committer license cost and excludes GitHub Actions minutes consumed by CodeQL as well as usage-based charges for AI features such as Copilot Autofix.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 对平台负责人而言，这是一条预算与治理信号：GitHub 正把代码质量/安全能力进一步产品化并按活跃提交者收费。即使技术深度有限，该更新能直接支持是否在全组织开启、只对核心仓库启用，或在 GA 前收缩试点范围等决策。
items.why_it_matters_en: For platform and engineering leads, this is primarily a budgeting and governance signal: GitHub is productizing code quality/security workflows with per-active-committer pricing. While technically shallow, it directly informs whether to enable it org-wide, restrict it to critical repos, or narrow pilots before GA.
key_takeaways_zh: GA 定价为每位活跃提交者每月 10 美元，且预估值以标准标价计算，不含折扣。
总成本不能只看许可证：还要额外核算 CodeQL 的 Actions 分钟和 AI 修复类能力的用量费用。
key_takeaways_en: GA pricing is $10 per active committer per month, and the estimate uses standard list pricing without discounts.
Total cost should not be inferred from license alone: teams must also model CodeQL Actions minutes and usage-based AI remediation charges.

top_items: GitHub Code Quality license estimate in public preview - GitHub Changelog
new_terms_zh: active committers（活跃提交者计费口径）
Code Quality license estimate（代码质量许可证费用预估）
themes_zh: AI/代码质量能力的商业化与成本可观测性
平台治理从功能试用转向席位与用量精细化管理
themes_en: Commercialization and cost visibility for AI/code-quality capabilities
Platform governance shifting from feature trials to seat and usage management
implications_zh: 如果你的组织正在评估 GitHub Code Quality，应立即按仓库与提交者分层做成本建模，而不是默认全量开启。
平台团队需要把许可证费用、CI 计算成本和 AI 增量费用拆开跟踪，否则容易低估真实 TCO。
implications_en: If your organization is evaluating GitHub Code Quality, model cost by repository tier and committer population rather than enabling it by default everywhere.
Platform teams should track license cost, CI compute cost, and AI add-on usage separately, or they will underestimate true TCO.
reading_order: GitHub Code Quality license estimate in public preview - GitHub Changelog
what_to_ignore_zh: GitHub Changelog 首页聚合页，不是独立高信号内容。
Separate SSO and Organizations pages in Settings：纯设置页信息架构调整，与 AI 编码、开发工具链或平台治理关联很弱。
what_to_ignore_en: The GitHub Changelog landing page, which is only an index and not a standalone high-signal item.
Separate SSO and Organizations pages in Settings: a basic settings IA change with little relevance to AI coding, developer tooling, or platform governance.
